title: Repository overview layout refinement
summary: The repository overview now prioritizes the README and snapshot timeline at the top, gives both panels a matched taller desktop height with internal scrolling, and simplifies artifact cards by removing the snapshot title and local path footer text.
userVisibleChange: Repository overview starts with balanced README and snapshot timeline panels, both are taller and equal-height on desktop, and artifact cards show only the screenshot preview plus its concise description/action.

timeline.title: Reordered overview content
timeline.summary: Kept README and snapshot timeline together as the top overview row and moved the latest snapshot card below that row.

timeline.title: Matched README and timeline heights
timeline.summary: Increased the README scroll area and gave both desktop cards the same outer height with internal scrolling.

timeline.title: Simplified artifact cards
timeline.summary: Removed the snapshot title and local artifact path footer from artifact cards while keeping previews and modal actions.

timeline.title: Verified repository views
timeline.summary: Verified build, Go tests, equal panel heights, simplified artifact cards, and a clean browser console.

decisions.title: Use equal outer card height on desktop
decisions.rationale: Matching the shell height instead of only the scroll body keeps README and timeline visually aligned despite different headers and padding.

decisions.title: Remove artifact footer metadata from cards
decisions.rationale: The requested card cleanup makes the artifact grid easier to scan; detailed source path remains available in the image preview modal.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit and vite build completed; embedded UI dist regenerated.

validation.command: Playwright repository page checks at http://localhost:4324/repositories/eve
validation.output: Verified README and timeline panels both render at 576px tall on desktop, artifact cards no longer show the snapshot title/path footer, and browser console has no warnings.

artifacts.description: Repository overview with README and snapshot timeline at the top using equal desktop card heights.
Artifacts tab with card footer metadata removed.
